corpus.category: Corporate cards and spend management platform (B2B fintech)
corpus.researchSummary: Ramp is an American financial technology company that offers corporate charge cards, expense management, and bill-payment software, and positions its product as an all-in-one spend management platform. Its platform combines corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, travel, procurement, and accounting automation into a single system, with messaging centered on helping businesses spend less and close their books faster. Public sources also describe Ramp as a fintech platform for businesses of all sizes, headquartered in New York City with offices in Miami and San Francisco.

evidence.claim: Ramp is an American financial technology company that offers corporate charge cards, expense management, and bill-payment software.
evidence.quote: Ramp Business Corporation is an American multinational financial technology company that offers corporate charge cards, expense management, and bill-payment software.

evidence.claim: Ramp is headquartered in New York City with additional offices in Miami and San Francisco.
evidence.quote: The company is headquartered in New York City with additional offices in Miami and San Francisco.

evidence.claim: Ramp positions itself as an all-in-one spend management platform.
evidence.quote: Ramp is an all-in-one spend management platform

evidence.claim: Ramp combines corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, travel, procurement, and accounting automation into a single system.
evidence.quote: that combines corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, travel, procurement, and accounting automation into a single system.

evidence.claim: Ramp's messaging focuses on making expense management easy.
evidence.quote: Make expense management easy with Ramp's spend management platform.

evidence.claim: Ramp is described by a third party as a fintech platform specializing in corporate card and spend management for businesses of all sizes.
evidence.quote: Ramp.com is a fintech platform specializing in corporate card and spend management for businesses of all sizes.

evidence.claim: Ramp has a customer support knowledge base, indicating a mature SaaS product with support documentation.
Ramp maintains product release communications, suggesting ongoing product development and feature expansion.
Ramp offers a startup-focused program or landing page.
Ramp has a mobile app available in the Apple App Store.

companyName.reasoning: The company is publicly identified as Ramp Business Corporation and branded as Ramp.

businessModel.value: B2B fintech and SaaS platform for corporate cards and spend management.
businessModel.reasoning: Public sources describe Ramp as a financial technology company offering corporate charge cards, expense management, and bill-payment software.

industryVertical.reasoning: Ramp is explicitly described as a financial technology company focused on corporate cards and spend management.

primaryIcpDescription.value: Finance teams and business leaders at companies that want to control spend, automate expenses and accounts payable, and modernize corporate card workflows.
primaryIcpDescription.reasoning: Ramp's homepage positions the platform around spend management and automation for business finance workflows.

jobTitles.value: CFO, VP of Finance, Controller, Head of Finance, Finance Manager, Accounts Payable Manager

geography.reasoning: Ramp is described as an American company headquartered in New York City.

headquartersLocation.value: New York City, New York, United States
headquartersLocation.reasoning: Wikipedia explicitly states the headquarters location.

productDescription.value: An all-in-one spend management platform that combines corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, travel, procurement, and accounting automation.
productDescription.reasoning: The homepage directly states this product scope.

coreDeliverables.value: Corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, travel, procurement, and accounting automation.
coreDeliverables.reasoning: These are explicitly listed on the homepage.

valueProp.value: Help businesses spend less and make expense management easy through a unified spend management platform.
valueProp.reasoning: Ramp's homepage emphasizes making expense management easy and being an all-in-one spend management platform.

uniqueEdge.value: Broad all-in-one spend management platform that unifies cards, expenses, AP, travel, procurement, and accounting automation.
uniqueEdge.reasoning: Ramp differentiates itself through platform breadth and consolidation of multiple finance workflows.

marketProblem.value: Fragmented finance tools make expense management and spend control harder for businesses.
marketProblem.reasoning: This is implied by Ramp's framing around making expense management easy and unifying multiple finance functions in one platform.

situationBeforeBuying.value: Companies are using separate tools for cards, expenses, accounts payable, and related workflows.
situationBeforeBuying.reasoning: Ramp's all-in-one platform description implies a pre-Ramp fragmented tool stack.

desiredTransformation.value: Move to a single platform that centralizes spend controls, automates workflows, and simplifies finance operations.
desiredTransformation.reasoning: This directly follows from Ramp's product positioning.

brandPositioning.value: A modern, software-driven spend management platform for businesses that want better control and easier finance operations.
brandPositioning.reasoning: Ramp positions itself around ease, control, and unified finance workflows.
